# Canon Registration Template

Use this template when a future canon addition needs a compact stack-registration
entry.

This template instantiates `canon-interoperability-registry.md`.

It is a registration template, not an automated indexer.
It does not confer authority.
It does not enforce dependencies at runtime.

A filled artifact using this template is a canon registration entry.

---

- `{artifact name}`
